EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem4GEN

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control additional properties and methods for projected coordinate systems. IProjectedCoordinateSystem4GEN is generic version of IProjectedCoordinateSystem4.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D44EDB15-8866-4641-872D-3C81F73AC8AA")]
public interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem4GEN

Properties

The abbreviated name of this spatial reference component.

string Abbreviation { get; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

<P>The <STRONG>IClone::IsIdentical</STRONG> method is not implemented. </P>

double

PrecisionImpl

An opaque reference to the precision information implementation for this spatial reference.

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

Projection

The map projection of a projected coordinate system.

IProjection Projection { get; }

Property Value

IProjection

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>A Projection object encapsulates the mathematics needed to convert geographic coordinates between two different coordinate systems. A projection is a component of a projected coordinate system and is not usually used directly. Rather, a projected cooordinate system is defined and used to project cooordinates.</P>

PseudoStandardParallel1

The latitude on an oblique spheroid that defines the oblique cone for a Krovak projected coordinate system.

double PseudoStandardParallel1 { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

The comment string of this spatial reference component.

string Remarks { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotation

The rotation value used to change the axis directions in a Krovak projected coordinate system.

double Rotation { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

The scale factor (K0) of a projected coordinate system.

double ScaleFactor { get; set; }

double

GetCentralLongitude()

Returns CentralLongitude of the projected coordinate system. Always defined, unlike CentralMeridian or LongitudeOfCenter.

double GetCentralLongitude()

Returns

double

GetNorthPole()

Returns north pole in projected coordinates, or an empty point if north pole is outside the PCS horizon.

WKSPoint GetNorthPole()

Returns

WKSPoint

Sample Snippet

Returns type of north pole geometry.

esriSRPoleGeometry

Gets the map projection parameters of a projected coordinate system. The array size needs to be esriSR_MaxParameterCountPrivate.

void GetParameters(ref IParameter[] parameters)

Parameters

parameters IParameter[]
